deviations.description: The process model on page 1 allows issuing a SIM card to customers with outstanding debt less than 100 €, but the updated requirement prohibits issuing a SIM card to customers with outstanding debt exceeding 50 €. This results in a violation for customers with debt between 50.01 € and 100 €, as the process does not prevent SIM card issuance in this range.

The change from 'issue_new_SIM_card' to 'issue_SIM_card' in the requirement aligns with the process model terminology, which uses 'Activate SIM card' and 'Send SIM card' but does not distinguish between new and replacement SIM cards. This change does not introduce or remove any compliance deviation.
